sourceAuthority: United States House of Representatives / GovInfo
requiredBeforeAutomation: Select one authoritative bulk/catalog endpoint for each document type
Verify archive layout and stable document identifiers
Record applicable public-domain and provenance terms
Add a representative XML fixture from each selected schema
note: No House document feed is published as canonical data until the source catalog and XML fixtures are verified. Congress.gov collections remain the current legislative source of record.
